---
title: ""
page-layout: full
format: html
---

<div class="about-container">

<div class="about-image">
<img src="images/FullSizeRender.png">
</div>

<div class="about-text">

# Get to Know Me

My connection to the environment began early. As a child, I was fascinated by rocks and the landscapes around me, which gradually grew into a broader curiosity about the natural world.

That curiosity evolved into a commitment to environmental work and ultimately shaped the path I chose, from my undergraduate studies to the sectors I’ve worked in, and now through my Master of Geomatics for Environmental Management (MGEM) at the University of British Columbia. Here my focus was on individual tree segmentation using airborne LiDAR 
data with Natural Resources Canada. 

Outside of work, I enjoy reading, biking, and staying active, ideally somewhere close to trees.

</div>

</div>
